First Aid.Description: Advanced healing for you and your pet. Scales with LVL, INT, and CHA.

Brains!.Description: Bite the target for a massive heal and instant pet conversion.

Slam.Description: A brutal physical strike dealing massive scaling damage.

Cleave.Description: A heavy swing that shatters enemy Armor (-3 AC).

Brace.Description: Hunker down, restoring 25 HP and gaining +5 Armor.

Distract.Description: Mesmerize the target. Duration scales (+1 turn per 10 CHA).

Cancel.Description: Loudly expose the target's flaws. Deals heavy CHA damage and lowers their attack.

Backstab.Description: A precise strike inflicting a severe Bleed (12 DoT).

Exploit.Description: High damage, leaving the target Exposed (-5 AC, -2 DMG).

Overload.Description: Overloaded tech, dealing damage and Shocking them (5 DoT, -3 DMG).

Lucky Strike.Description: Swing wildly for random damage and gain an aura of extreme luck.

Lob Tissue.Description: Lob infected mass. High chance to convert target to a Pet.

Toxic Cloud.Description: Dense cloud. Chance to convert target, or inflict heavy Zombie Rot.

Transform.Description: Fully restore HP and gain +20 Damage for 10 turns.

Eat Flesh.Description: Tear into flesh, dealing heavy damage and recovering 15 HP.

Bite.Description: Bare your fangs to deal damage and recover Blood Points (BP).

Blood Curse.Description: Inflict heavy DoT. The target rises as a Vampiric Pet upon death.

Firearm.Description: Fire your Glock .45 for massive damage and gain Adrenaline (+DEX, +TAC, +AC).

Vicious Kick.Description: A heavy kick. 50% chance to Stun, otherwise Slows the enemy.

Boneguard.Description: Permanent AC and damage reflection scaling with Character Level.

Friends in Low Places.Description: Chance after combat to be gifted items by a sewer rat.

Two Fisting.Description: Allows equipping a second weapon via 'equip offhand [item]'.

Foresight.Description: Type 'use foresight' to scan the next room and optionally ambush the enemy.

Quite Shocking.Description: Permanent aura dealing level-scaled damage. Casts free Overload every 10 ticks.

Heads or Tails.Description: 51% chance to deal massive double damage, 49% chance to lose your turn.

Goo Shoes.Description: All attacks have a 10% chance to inflict Flinch on the enemy.

Rotting Touch.Description: 10% chance to infect non-immune enemies with Zombie Rot when they hit you.

Bloodthirst.Description: Recover 10% of your Maximum HP every time you kill an enemy.

Blood Mist.Description: Sacrifice BP for massive +Damage and +10 AC for 5 rounds. Causes Exhaustion.

Mad Skills.Description: Your highest primary stat is permanently added to your base damage.

Skullcracker.Description: 5% chance to deal bonus STR damage and trigger a free Brace.

Reflective Armor.Description: 10% chance to perfectly reflect an attack and heal for half the damage.

Rumor Mill.Description: 5% chance per turn to confuse the enemy into attacking itself.

Stealth.Description: Permanent 90% evasion until you attack. Doubles Backstab damage from the shadows.

Tactical Advantage.Description: Weave in a free tactical strike at the end of every round.

Mad Inventor.Description: Type 'combine [item]' to fuse duplicates and legendary currencies into god-tier gear.

Nothing Up My Sleeves.Description: 10% chance to gain 1 SP when using a skill. 5% chance the skill is completely free.

Flesh Parasite.Description: 10% chance to heal for 50% of the damage dealt by Lob Tissue and DoT ticks.

Legendary Toxin.Description: 5% chance your Toxic Cloud ignores boss immunity and instantly converts them.

Feeding Frenzy.Description: 15% chance to make Flesh skills free. Hulks gain free Brains! on normal attacks.

Exsanguinate.Description: Requires 70 BP. Bleeds, Exploits, and Cripples the target. Recovers 5 BP. Causes Exhaustion.

Double-Pump.Description: Equip the Shotgun to consume 2 Ammo for devastating damage and bleeding.
